status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data. Note: suse.com also has a separate advisory registry entry for SUSE-SU advisories.
notes: SUSE is a German open-source enterprise Linux company. SUSE Product Security publishes CSAF-format advisories via the suse.de domain. This covers CSAF distribution; the suse.com advisory entry covers SUSE-SU security update advisories. CSAF and CSAF-VEX documents are hosted on ftp.suse.com.

data.description: Machine-readable security advisories in CSAF format. Includes both CSAF advisories and CSAF-VEX documents.
data.notes: CSAF csaf_trusted_provider. Contact: security@suse.de. Two directory trees: csaf/ for advisories and csaf-vex/ for VEX documents.
